name: BestGofer Inc.
business: BestGofer operates two segments: a pre-operational delivery platform intending to provide on-demand delivery services via a smartphone app, and a home inspection services segment through its wholly owned subsidiary Liberty Home Inspection Services LLC. The home inspection services segment provides professional home inspection services to residential buyers, sellers, and real estate professionals in the State of Washington. The delivery platform segment has not generated any revenue to date and has not launched its consumer-facing application.
sellsTo: Residential home buyers, sellers, and real estate professionals in Washington
Consumers (retailers, businesses, individuals) needing delivery services

exposures.sentence: BestGofer (or the Company) intends to focus on the delivery industry by providing consumers with the ability of having any desired retail item purchased on their behalf delivered directly to their door at any given time.
LHIS provides professional home inspection services to residential buyers, sellers, and real estate professionals in the State of Washington.

catalysts.event: Commencement of private placement of common stock or debt securities to accredited investors, targeting gross proceeds of up to $150,000
catalysts.sentence: The Company intends to address its projected funding deficit through... (ii) a private placement of the Company's common stock or debt securities to accredited investors under Regulation D of the Securities Act of 1933, targeting gross proceeds of up to $150,000, which management intends to commence during the first half of fiscal year 2026
